name: alt_spread
description: Alternative enterprise compromise patterns (new C1/C2/C3) designed to differ from the default set.

C1.description: Concentrated in s4 (different subnet than default C1).

C2.description: Spread across s2/s3/s4 (different spread than default C2).

C3.description: Dangerous: directly on the critical-server neighborhood (s3_8 is directly connected to d3_1).
